queries.question: Which treatments are common to all spas and what are their descriptions?
queries.sql: SELECT Treatments.name, Treatments.description  from Spa_Treatments join Treatments on Spa_Treatments.treatment_id = Treatments.treatment_id join Spa on Spa_Treatments.spa_id = Spa.spa_id   GROUP BY Spa_Treatments.treatment_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Spa_Treatments.spa_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Spa)

queries.question: Show me descriptions of treatments available for every spa.
queries.sql: SELECT Treatments.description  from Spa_Treatments join Treatments on Spa_Treatments.treatment_id = Treatments.treatment_id join Spa on Spa_Treatments.spa_id = Spa.spa_id   GROUP BY Spa_Treatments.treatment_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Spa_Treatments.spa_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Spa)

queries.question: Show me descriptions of treatments available for every spa.
queries.sql: select spa.name , treatments.description from Spa_Treatments join Treatments on Spa_Treatments.treatment_id = Treatments.treatment_id join Spa on Spa_Treatments.spa_id = Spa.spa_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?description WHERE {
  ?spa_treatments a :Spa_Treatments .
  ?treatments a :Treatments .
  ?spa_treatments p:hasTreatments ?treatments .
  ?spa a :Spa .
  ?spa_treatments p:hasSpa ?spa .
  ?spa p:name ?name .
  ?treatments p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: What treatment options do we have for each spa?
queries.sql: SELECT Treatments.name  from Spa_Treatments join Treatments on Spa_Treatments.treatment_id = Treatments.treatment_id join Spa on Spa_Treatments.spa_id = Spa.spa_id   GROUP BY Spa_Treatments.treatment_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Spa_Treatments.spa_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Spa)

queries.question: What treatment options do we have for each spa?
queries.sql: select spa.name , treatments.name from Spa_Treatments join Treatments on Spa_Treatments.treatment_id = Treatments.treatment_id join Spa on Spa_Treatments.spa_id = Spa.spa_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?name2 WHERE {
  ?spa_treatments a :Spa_Treatments .
  ?treatments a :Treatments .
  ?spa_treatments p:hasTreatments ?treatments .
  ?spa a :Spa .
  ?spa_treatments p:hasSpa ?spa .

  ?treatments p:name ?name2 .
}

queries.question: Give me the treatments that every spa has and their descriptions.
queries.sql: select spa.name , treatments.name , treatments.description from Spa_Treatments join Treatments on Spa_Treatments.treatment_id = Treatments.treatment_id join Spa on Spa_Treatments.spa_id = Spa.spa_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?name2 ?description WHERE {
  ?spa_treatments a :Spa_Treatments .
  ?treatments a :Treatments .
  ?spa_treatments p:hasTreatments ?treatments .
  ?spa a :Spa .
  ?spa_treatments p:hasSpa ?spa .
  ?spa p:name ?name .
  ?treatments p:name ?name2 .
  ?treatments p:description ?description .
}
